text: In Central, the most sold product was Easy-staple paper and was overall barely profitable region with a margin of 7.9% while having a below-average performing sales among all regions. The total sales were $501239.89. Additionally the average discount given was 24.0% (64.4% of orders were discounted).

In East, the most sold product was Staple envelope and was overall moderately profitable region with a margin of 13.5% while having an above-average performing sales among all regions. The total sales were $678781.24. Additionally the average discount given was 14.5% (49.1% of orders were discounted).

In South, the most sold product was Easy-staple paper and was overall moderately profitable region with a margin of 11.9% while having one of the weakest performing sales among all regions. The total sales were $391721.91. Additionally the average discount given was 14.7% (50.3% of orders were discounted).

In West, the most sold product was Staples and was overall moderately profitable region with a margin of 14.9% while having one of the strongest performing sales among all regions. The total sales were $725457.82. Additionally the average discount given was 10.9% (46.4% of orders were discounted).
